text: Ame kukua ƒe ƒometɔwo ate ŋu atso nya me le afisi woaɖi woƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔa le ŋu.
ref: The deceased's relatives can decide where to bury their loved one.
translated: The deceased's family members can decide where to bury their loved one.

text: Woade se ɖe V8/V6 tɔdziʋuwo alo tɔdziʋu ɖesiaɖe si ƒe gbeɖiɖi sɔ kple esia hehe nu, negbe mɔzɔzɔ yi kɔƒenutowo me ko.
ref: Towing of the V8/V6 vessels or any vessel of similar tone will be prohibited, except for trips to rural areas.
translated: A ban will be placed on V8/V6 vehicles or any vehicle with a similar sound, except for travel to rural areas.

text: Esesẽna ŋutɔ be ame siwo ƒoa wo ɖokuiwo ɖe teƒe vovovowo la nawɔ nu aduadu.
ref: It's quite hard to mix with people of different cultural beriefs.
translated: It is very difficult for people who are in different places to work together.

text: Edze be na xe adzɔga nenye be ne le asi tsam le anyigba sɔe aɖe dzi.

text: Nu siwo wozãna tsɔ ƒoa asa na asrãdɔ nye atikewo, mu ɖaɖe nuwo ɖa kple ale si womate ŋu aƒo asa na nuɖuɖu o.
ref: Methods used to prevent malaria include medications, mosquito elimination and the prevention of bites.
translated: The things used to prevent malaria are medicines, cleaning up things, and how they cannot avoid food.

text: Nyɔnuvi dzetugbee wònye, gake ate ŋu aƒo nu kplii, gake melɔ̃ ɖe edzi kura o, togbɔ be ɖevia vivina hã la, eléa ɖoɖo ɖe edzi ɣesiaɣi, eye taɖua megahea ta na dzila aɖeke vɛ o.
ref: She is a beautiful girl, but she is just too much trouble. She can talk, she can argue, but she never agrees. Her brother however is a sweet boy. He is always calm, and never causes his parents any headaches.
translated: She is a beautiful girl, and though you can talk to her, she never agrees to anything. Even though the child is sweet, she is always disciplined, and she no longer causes trouble for any parent.

text: Dunyahela ate ŋu anɔ dunyaheha ɖesiaɖe me faa.
ref: A politician is free to belong to any political party.
translated: A politician can freely belong to any political party.

text: poliswo le dɔ wɔm kple bɔswo dzi kpɔlawo be yewoakpɔ egbɔ ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe.
ref: Police are working with bus managers to find a long term solution.
translated: The police are working with bus supervisors to ensure it for a long time.

text: Dukɔmevi akpa gãtɔ xɔ edzi se be ate ŋu awɔe eye wòawɔe geɖe wu.
ref: Most of the citizens believe in him that he can do it and do it more.
translated: The majority of citizens believed that they could do it and would do even more.

text: Asitsalawo adzɔ ga na bɔlƒoƒea tutu.

translated: Business people will raise funds for the construction of the football field.

text: Kpekpe aɖe nɔ anyi ku ɖe motsyɔnu si woama na sitsoƒedilaawo ŋu.
ref: There was a meeting about the face mask distribution to the refugees.
translated: A meeting was held concerning the vehicles to be distributed to the refugees.

text: Enɔ ɖevi si gbɔ wòtso, eye wònɔ kɔƒea me, le ŋuve me kple ƒu si te ɖe ƒu la ŋu.
ref: He lived a carefree childhood, spent in the village, in the bush, and on the nearby sea.
translated: He/She was with the child from whom he/she came, and he/she was in the village, in the sun, and the sea that was close to the coast.

text: Eyae nye agbanɔamedzi be dziɖuɖua nakpɔ egbɔ be atike vɔ̃ɖiwo li le kɔdzi.
ref: It's the government's responsibility to make sure there are drugs in hospitals.
translated: It is the government's responsibility to ensure that harmful drugs are in the hospital.

text: Kpɔ nyuie, tsɔ aʋawɔnu vɔ̃ɖiwo kpe ɖe fiafitɔwo ŋu.
ref: Be careful, thieves carry dangerous weapons along with them.
translated: Beware, the thieves are armed with dangerous weapons.

text: Mele be nàƒo nu le telefon dzi esime nèle ʋu kum o elabena wolée le esi wòku ʋu ŋumaɖɔɖotɔe ta.
ref: You should not talk on the phone while driving as He was arrested for driving recklessly.
translated: You should not talk on the phone while driving because he was arrested for reckless driving.

text: Alesi atiglinyia ƒe ŋutigbalẽ sɔe nye be wòaɖe nyɔnuvi ƒewuivi si le sɔhɛmenɔɣi ƒe kɔnuwo me tom afia be, abe alesi lãa sesẽ ene la, nenemae wòle be wòasẽ ŋu nenema ke le agbe me.
ref: The relevance of the elephant skin is to show the teenage girl going through the puberty rites that, just as the meat is hard, that's how strong she should equally be in life.
translated: The significance of the crocodile's skin is to show a young girl undergoing puberty rituals that, just as the animal is strong, so too must she be strong in life.

text: Esia fia kɔte be, Fianyɔnua ƒe dɔe wònye be wòatia amesi dze tso fiaƒomea me
ref: This clearly signify, it is the role of the Queenmother to select the qualify candidate from the royal family
translated: This specifically means that it is the queen's duty to choose a suitable person from the royal family.

text: Ŋutifafa, ɖoɖowɔwɔ kple dedienɔnɔ ƒe gbedeasi ye sinimaa la nɔ gbeƒã ɖem.
ref: The film was preaching the word of peace, order and stability.
translated: The film was delivering a message of peace, order, and security.

text: Ame geɖewo xɔ tso lãmeka falɛfalɛa me le esi wokpɔe be lãmesẽnyawo le míaƒe lãmesẽnyawo ŋu
ref: A good number of people have recovered from the coronavirus proving that we have a strong health sector
translated: Many people developed a weak immune system because they realized that health issues were affecting their health.

text: Nuɖuɖu deŋgɔwo le abe amegbetɔwo ƒe agbe me.
ref: Beans contain a high food value for human life.
translated: Good nutrition is like human life.

text: Nyɔnu aɖewo yia ŋgɔ wu ɣleti asieke siwo wofɔ fufɔfɔ ɖo la dometɔ aɖewo.
ref: Some women go beyond or below the supposed nine months of their pregnancy.
translated: Some women go beyond nine months of pregnancy.

text: Eɖe srɔ̃ esime wòxɔ ƒe wuienyi eye eya hã nɔ dɔ wɔm le ketekedzeƒea, eye esi wòxɔ ƒe wuiasieke la, edzi nyɔnuvi.
ref: He married at the age of eighteen also working at the railway station, at the age of nineteen he had a daughter.
translated: She got married when she was eighteen, and she was also working at the train station. When she turned nineteen, she gave birth to a baby girl.

text: Enye nunyala, eye wòtea ŋu wɔa nu ɖe dukɔ sia ƒe kplɔla ŋu.
ref: She is a wise and capable leader for this country.
translated: He/She is wise, and he/she can act against this nation's leader.

text: Ekpena ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe susu ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nyuie ŋu
ref: It helps in the efficiency of the human mind
translated: It helps with the proper functioning of the human mind.

text: Le ƒe 2020 me la, wowɔ numekuku le sukudede kple sukudede ŋu le Ghana afisia. When the investigation ended, some of the things that came to light are as follows.
ref: In 2020, a survey of schooling and education was conducted here in Ghana. When the investigation ended, some of the things that came to light are as follows.
translated: In 2020, an investigation was conducted on education and schooling here in Ghana. When the investigation ended, some of the things that came to light are as follows.

text: Míate ŋu aƒo nya ta tso esia me be ame ɖesiaɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔna kpɔa dzidzedze la le etɔxɛ.
ref: We can infer from this that each person's time to success is unique.
translated: We can conclude from this that everyone's timeline for success is unique.

text: Nyateƒee, kɔnu kple akpa siawo katã ɖe Fianyɔnu Dada ƒe vevienyenye kple vevienyenye fia le Akantɔwo ƒe dekɔnuwo kple hadomegbenɔnɔ me. Ẽ, le Akantɔwo ƒe hadomegbenɔnɔ me la, Fianyɔnu vidada geɖewo ɖu fia kpe ɖe Fiawo ŋu.
ref: Indeed, all these customs and roles signify the importance and relevance of the Queenmother in Akans' culture and society. Yes, in the Akan society, many Queenmothers have reigned alongside Kings.
translated: Truly, all these customs and roles demonstrate the importance and significance of the Queen Mother in Akan culture and society. Yes, in Akan society, many Queen Mothers ruled alongside Kings.

text: Sɔhɛ siawo ƒe gãtɔ le atike vɔ̃ɖi zazã me.
ref: Majority of the youth are involved in drug abuse.
translated: The majority of these youths are involved in dangerous drug use.

text: Azɔ hã, aɖuɖɔɖɔɖɔ kple lũhɛ kpena ɖe ame ŋu wòɖea aɖi ɖesiaɖe ɖa le ŋutilãa me.
ref: Also, rubbing the gums with a razor helps to remove any toxins from the body.
translated: Also, proper foods and bitter leaf help one to remove any toxins from the body.

text: Ŋkeke kɔkɔe siawo dzɔna le Kwasiɖagbe, Dzoɖa, Braɖa, Kuda, Fiɖa kple Memleɖagbe.
ref: These sacred days occurs on Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday and Saturday.
translated: These special days occur on Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Saturday.

text: Esi wònɔ nu ƒom le Kwame Nkrumah Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya Yunivɛsiti (KNUST) le woƒe ƒe 40 xɔxɔ le nusiwo wogbugbɔ zãna me la, ekpɔ be manyo ne wokpɔ nuwɔna sia ƒomevi eye woŋe aɖaba ƒu wo dzi o, ne wokpɔ nusiwo tsi tre ɖe se ŋu.
ref: When he was speaking in the Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology (KNUST) during their 40th anniversary in recycling, he saw that it wouldn't be nice if they see this kind of practices and ignored them, when they see things against the law happening.
translated: As he was speaking at the Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology (KNUST) during their 40th anniversary celebration on matters of recycling, he noted that it would be good if they observed such activities and did not ignore them, especially when they encountered illegal acts.

text: Ɣebubuɣiwo hã ne wokpɔ deti ƒe aŋgbawo le anyigba aɖe dzi la, efia be wole nya hem le anyigbaa ŋu.
ref: Other times, too, when palm fronds are seen on a piece of land, it indicates litigation over the land.
translated: Also, at other times, if they see palm tree roots on a piece of land, it means they are making a claim on that land.

text: Le nyateƒe me la, esime esia nɔ edzi yim la, amewo nɔ anyi, siwo dome ɖevia dada hã nɔ, gake wo dometɔ aɖeke mete ŋu ɖo aɖaŋu na tagbɔsesẽtɔ la be wòadzudzɔ ɖevia ƒoƒo o.
ref: In fact, while this was going on, there were people, including the child's mother, but none of them could advise the crazy man to stop beating the child.
translated: In fact, while this was going on, people were present, among whom was the child's mother, but none of them could advise the stubborn person to stop beating the child.

text: Numekulawo ɖee fia be tsinono ɖea sukli ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le ŋutilã me dzi kpɔtɔna eye wòkpɔa ame ta tso suklidɔ me elabena nunyiamewo abe Vitamin kple bubuawo yɔ tsi me fũ
ref: Researchers have shown that drinking water reduces the amount of glucose in the body and protects against diabetes as water is full of nutrients like Vitamin and others
translated: Researchers have shown that drinking water reduces the amount of sugar in the body and protects people from diabetes because nutrients like vitamins and others are abundant in water.

text: Zimenɔla la ɖe gbeƒãe be yewoaɖo dedienɔnɔdzikpɔla bubuwo ɖe zã me.
ref: The chairman announced the deployment of more security forces in the night.
translated: The chairman announced that they would appoint additional security guards at night.

text: Woaɖo xɔdzisasrãwo ɖe atikplɔƒea hena dedienɔnɔ.
ref: A fence will be built around the staff quarters for security.
translated: They will install fire extinguishers in the laboratory for safety.

text: Míayi edzi alé ŋku ɖe tsaɖilawo ƒe teƒe bubu siwo le Ashanti nutoa me ŋu le míaƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ si gbɔna me.
ref: we will continue look at the other tourist site in the Ahanti region in our next lesson.
translated: We will continue to focus on other tourist sites in the Ashanti Region in our next study.

text: Wogblɔ be adzodada si Nana Agradaa zã tsɔ xɔ ga le ameawo si la ɖo eƒe gbedoxɔ me fifia.
ref: It is said that the extortion used by Nana Agradaa to extort money from the people has now reached his temple.
translated: It is said that the fraud Nana Agradaa used to extort money from people has now reached her church.

text: Ne èkpɔ nusiawo katã la, efia be no me kansa le nu gblẽm le wò susu ŋu, Kpɔ wò ɖɔkta enumake.
ref: If you see all these, it means that breast cancer is killing your memory, See your doctor immediately.
translated: If you experience all these symptoms, it means that breast cancer is affecting your brain. See your doctor immediately.

text: Ehiã be ame nate ŋu atsɔ nu siwo katã nye koléra (le kpɔɖeŋu me, nudodowo, nudodowo kple kpluwo me) la aƒle ahawɔ wo ɖokuiwo nyuie.
ref: Proper disposal and treatment of all materials that may have come into contact with the feces of other people with cholera (e.g., clothing, bedding, etc.) are essential.
translated: It is necessary that people are able to wash all things contaminated with cholera (for example, clothes, textiles, and cups) and protect themselves well.

text: Amewo dina ɣesiaɣi be nu nyuitɔ na yewo ɖokuiwo nenye be edi be yewodzudzɔ dɔwɔwɔ hã.
ref: People always want the best for themselves even if it requires them to stop working.
translated: People always want the best for themselves, even if they want to stop working.

text: Wokpe amedzrowo be woade poliswo ƒe dɔwɔƒea.
ref: Residents were invited to attend the grand opening of the police station.
translated: They invited the visitors to the police station.

text: Dziɖuɖua le klalo be yeaɖe gbeƒã asi yeye siwo woatsɔ akpe ɖe kokoo ƒe asiwo ŋu le kwasiɖa si gbɔna ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi ne wodze ɣeyiɣi kple teƒe siwo woawɔ kokoo la gɔme.
ref: The government is ready to announce the new prices that would be added to the coco prices on the first day of the week coming when they launch the time and places for the cocoa.
translated: The government is ready to announce new measures to support cocoa prices on the first day of next week, when the time and place for cocoa production begins.

text: Nutoa me ŋgɔnɔlawo ɖoe be yewoakpɔ ale si nutoa me tɔwo wɔa dɔe.
ref: Local leaders have plans underway to ensure regional development .
translated: The community leaders decided to observe how the community members work.

text: Le esiawo katã me la, NPP ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo meda asi ɖe NDC ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo ƒe biabia dzi o. Woɖe eme be togbɔ be yewodi be woaɖe Ganyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le dɔme hã la, yewoazã yewoƒe ŋutetewo.
ref: Within all this, the NPP Members of Parliament did not support NDC Members of Parliament request. They explained that although they want the Finance Minister to be sack but they will use their means
translated: In all of this, the NPP Members of Parliament did not agree to the request of the NDC Members of Parliament. They explained that even though they wanted to remove the Minister of Finance from office, they would use their own means.

text: Ebia tso dziɖuɖua si be wòava kpe ɖe Bomaaman ŋu, elabena wokplɔa wo yia afisiafi
ref: He asked the government to come to the aid of Bomaaman, because they are taken away everywhere
translated: He asked the government to come and help Bomaaman, because they are taken everywhere.

text: Ŋku- bli, karɔt, koklozi, ayi, atadi, salmon, nagoti.
ref: Eyes- maize, carrots, eggs, beans, pepper, salmon, sweet potato.
translated: Eye-, rice, carrot, chicken egg, palm nut, pepper, salmon, groundnut

text: Akɔntabubudɔwɔƒea awɔ etɔ sinua axe fetuawo ɖe game dzi.
ref: The accounts office will do its best to pay the salaries on time.
translated: The accounting department will do its part then pay the fees on time.

text: Sɔhɛ aɖewo metea ŋu xɔa dɔ le sukunuwuɣi o, gake eda ga geɖe ɖe eƒe dɔwo me le nutoa me be wòakpe ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋu be woadzidze aƒemedɔwo ɖe edzi.
ref: Some youths fail to get jobs after graduation, but he has injected more money into his businesses in the area to help women increase household income.
translated: Some youth cannot get jobs during school holidays, but he/she invested a lot of money in his/her projects in the community to help women improve their domestic work.

text: Ame aɖewo mehiã ale gbegbe be wometea ŋu wɔa atikewɔnyawo o, eye zi geɖe la, woɖea wo ɖe aga le woƒe aƒewo me.
ref: Some people are too poor to access medical services. They are usually quarantined in their homes.
translated: Some people are not so ill that they cannot perform medical tasks, and often, they are isolated in their homes.

text: Azɔ hã, nyɔnu tsitsi aɖe tso fofoa ƒe ƒomea me xɔ ɖevia eye wòtsɔ avɔ ɣi tsyɔ ɖevia dzi eye ɖevia tasi ayɔ ŋkɔ si vifofoa di be yeatsɔ ana ɖevia.
ref: Also, an old woman from the family of the father recived the child and cover the child with white cloth and the aunty of the child will mention the name that the father wants to give it to the child.
translated: Then, an elder woman from his father's family received the child and covered the child with a white cloth, and the child's aunt would call the name that the child's father wanted to give the child.

text: Ametafatafae nye be woaxɔ ga le ame aɖe si anukwaremaɖimaɖitɔe to ametafatafa alo ameflunyawo me.
ref: Swindle is to get money dishonestly from someone by cheating or deceiving them.
translated: Fraud is to dishonestly take money from someone through deception or trickery.

text: Sitsoƒedila aɖewo mate ŋu ade dɔwɔƒea o, elabena ame geɖewo dze dɔ le ɣleti sia dzi.
ref: Some refugees cannot attend the workshop because many have fallen sick this month.
translated: Some employees will not be able to go to the workplace, because many people fell ill this month.

text: Nutomekɔmitia kpɔa ame siwo le nutoa me ƒe dedienɔnɔ dzi.
ref: The district committee is responsible for the security of the people in the area.
translated: The local committee ensures the safety of the people in the community.

text: Míate ŋu akpɔ ŋutete siawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖewo me.
ref: Most of the skills can be acquired over a given period of time.
translated: We can observe most of these capabilities over time.

text: Abe alesi hamemetsitsiwo gblɔe ene la, gbeɖeka le susu aɖe ta míelɔ̃a kpakpaluʋui ƒe dzoa yiyi.
ref: As the elders have said, one day for a reason we love to go to the quail fire.
translated: As the elders said, one day for some reason we liked going to the Kpakpaluʋui market.

text: Togbɔ be atike aɖeke meli fifia o hã la, blanuilélenutsitikewo kpena ɖe ame mawo ŋu be woanɔ te ɖe enu vivivi.
ref: Although there is no cure at present, antidepressants help such people to cope slowly.
translated: Even though there is no cure available right now, antidepressants help those people to cope with it gradually.

text: Wona nɔvinyenyɔnu dzea dɔnɔa ƒe ɖɔktawo gbɔ.
ref: My aunt was promoted to the position of senior doctor of the hospital.
translated: They took the pregnant sister to the doctors.

text: Esi afɔdzia ƒoa ƒu nɔa afima ŋkeke geɖe ta la, ame la sena le eɖokui me be agba le yeƒe ali kple axame me.
ref: Because the solid waste gathers and remains there for days, the person feels heaviness behind the loins and the abdomen.
translated: Since the leg swells up and remains swollen for many days, the person feels a burden in their waist and back.

text: Anyigbatata ƒe akpa aɖee nye ale si nàde dzesi mɔnu siwo katã ado dzidzɔ na amee.
ref: Mapping an area involves identifying all the boundaries for the area of interest.
translated: One aspect of geography is how you identify all the opportunities that will bring joy to people.

text: Nu siawoe nye vifofo si aƒle wo dome akpa gãtɔ.
ref: These things is the father who will buy most of them.
translated: These things are for the father who will buy the majority of them.

text: Zi geɖe la, wozãa agbeli aŋgbawo alo aŋgba bubu si sɔ na esia.
ref: They usually use cassava leaves or a similar leaf for this.
translated: Often, cassava tubers or other suitable tubers are used for this.

text: Woawɔ kpekpe kpui aɖe atsɔ adzro mɔ si dzi sitsoƒedila siawo ato ayi ŋgɔe me.
ref: There will be a brief meeting to discuss the way forward for these refugees.
translated: They will hold a short meeting to discuss the way forward for these refugees.

text: Ke amekae nènye be nàgblɔ na nunɔla la be eƒe aɖuwo biã? Ne èfe kplii hã la, atsɔ wò ade gaxɔ me.
ref: but who are you to tell the priest that his teeth are red? If you play with him too, he will put you in prison.
translated: And who are you to tell the priest that his teeth are yellow? Even if you joke with him, he will put you in prison.

text: Nusi wogblɔna zi geɖe enye be, ne nyɔnua wɔe nenema la, ana vidzĩ si le dɔ me madze tugbe alo dze de ka o.
ref: What they normally say is that, if the woman does that, it will make the unborn baby not to look beautiful or handsome.
translated: It is often said that if the woman does it that way, it will cause the baby in the womb not to be beautiful or to be deformed.

text: Woakpɔ mɔnu siwo katã wozãna tsɔ wɔa dɔ nyuie la dze sii.
ref: All techniques used in improving production will be seen.
translated: They will recognize all the methods used to work well.

text: Le afisia hã la, mɔzɔla siwo tso Accra yi Tamale axe GH 240.00. Mina míalé ŋku ɖe asi yeye siwo VIP JEOUN ɖe gbeƒãe fifia ŋu
ref: Again, travelers from Accra to Tamale will pay GH?240.00. Lets look at the new prices VIP JEOUN has now announced
translated: Here too, passengers traveling from Accra to Tamale will pay GH 240.00. Let's take note of the new fares VIP JEOUN has just announced.

text: Àɖo ŋku edzi be míekpɔe le sinima aɖewo abe "The weeping soul, The maid, Dumebi the dirty girl, Heart of a fighter"  kple sinima bubuwo me.
ref: You will recall that we saw her in some movies like "The weeping soul, The maid, Dumebi the dirty girl, Heart of a fighter" and other movies.
translated: You will remember that we saw him/her in some movies like "The weeping soul, The maid, Dumebi the dirty girl, Heart of a fighter" and other movies.

text: Wode asi nubabla aɖe te ɖe nutome gãwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu
ref: An agreement was signed for regional development .
translated: They signed an agreement concerning the work of major regions.

text: Zi geɖe la, hamemegãwo ɖea nunya si le "ƒoƒo atraɖii, gbãa ati" me fiana.
ref: The elders often express the wisdom of "continuous hitting, breaks the wood."
translated: Often, community elders demonstrate the wisdom that lies in 'hitting slowly, breaks the stick'.

text: Menye ɖeviwo katãe nèdina ne ètsi o.
ref: Not everything you want as a child you get when you grow old.
translated: You don't want all children when you grow up.

text: Ame sia ate ŋu ata avɔ sia atsɔ aɖo dzesiwo ɖe amesiwo nɔa te ɖe eŋu la ŋu.
ref: This person can wear this cloth to send signals to those who depend on him.
translated: Anyone can paint this fabric and mark those who are subject to him.

text: Ele be ŋutsuwo nate ŋu awɔ dɔ sesĩe ale be woakpe ɖe yewoƒe ƒomea ŋu.
ref: Men must work hard in order to support their families.
translated: It is necessary that men are able to work hard so that they can help their families.

text: Edze egɔme va se ɖe esime wònɔ tɔdziʋu aɖeke me o va se ɖe esime wònɔ tɔdziʋua me.
ref: She started without a having designate orphanage house until she owned one.
translated: He began from when he was not in any boat until he was in the boat.

text: Ele be woadze agbagba ɖesiaɖe awɔ wɔna kple nuƒo vovovowo le teƒe siwo le se nu alo le dziɖuɖua ƒe xɔwo me;
ref: They must make every effort to hold various events and lectures in lawful places or buildings of the government;
translated: They must make every effort to carry out various activities and speeches in legal places or in government buildings.

text: Le esi teƒe be woazã aŋgbawo le mɔ xoxoa nu atsɔ axlɔ̃ nu amewo tso mɔ̃ siwo me afɔku le la ŋu la, fifia wotea avɔ dzĩwo ɖe mɔ̃ vɔ̃ɖiawo ŋu.
ref: Instead of the old method of using leaves to alert people about the deadly traps that have been set, strips of red cloth are now knotted around the harmful traps.
translated: Instead of using signs in the old way to warn people about dangerous machines, now they tie red cloths on the dangerous machines.

text: Eŋutinunyalawo kple dɔwɔƒegã siwo ate ŋu akpɔ nutoa me dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔwo gbɔ le nutome la me.
ref: The district has experts and bureaucrats who can handle local government projects.
translated: Experts and large organizations that can manage local government affairs in the region.

text: Le míaƒe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya gɔmesese si le ta kekem ta la, womegatsɔa dɔléle siwo xɔa ame me doa ƒome kple dzixɔse siwo do xoxo o, ke boŋ wozãa atikewɔwɔmɔnu deŋgɔwo tsɔ daa dɔe.
ref: Because of our expanding understanding of science, infectious diseases are no longer associated with outdated belief systems and are instead treated using cutting-edge medical procedures.
translated: As our scientific understanding rapidly advances, diseases affecting people are not associated with old beliefs, but rather advanced medical methods are used to treat them.

text: Ghanaitɔ geɖewo ahe to na ame ale gbegbe nenye be coronavirus le abe Ebola ene
ref: Many Ghanaians would be so disciplined if coronavirus was like Ebola.
translated: Many Ghanaians would suffer so much if coronavirus were like Ebola.

text: Nutomeƒlelawo nye dugã ƒe teƒenɔlawo le woƒe nutoa me.
ref: Resident district commissioners are representatives of the president in their district.
translated: The locals are the city's representatives in their region.

text: Esi woɖe asi le eŋu le gaxɔ me le ƒe 1966 me la, Dr.Ebenezer Ako-Adjei megakpɔ gome le Ghana dunyahehe me abe alesi wòwɔe tsã ene o.
ref: After his release from prison in 1966, Dr.Ebenezer Ako-Adjei no longer participated in Ghanaian politics as he had done before.
translated: When he was released from prison in 1966, Dr. Ebenezer Ako-Adjei no longer participated in Ghanaian politics as he used to.

text: Woƒe fia kɔkɔtɔ enye Asante fia Dwaben fia Nana Yaw Sarpong nye wo vi atɔ̃lia.
ref: Their highest king is Asante king the king of Dwaben Nana Yaw Sarpong is their fifth child.
translated: Their paramount chief was Nana Yaw Sarpong, the Asante and Dwaben chief, and he was their fifth child.

text: Woƒe kɔnyinyiwoe nye be woanɔ fia vɔ̃ɖi si nye Togbe Agorkoli (Agorkoli) te, eye ale be woate ŋu asi le eƒe dziɖuɖu sesẽ la me ale be woawɔ do aɖe le gli si ƒo xlã woƒe dua me la me.
ref: Oral tradition has it that they lived under a wicked king, Togbe Agorkoli ( Agor Akorli), and in order to escape his tyrannical rule they had to create a hole in the mud wall that surrounded their town.
translated: Their plight was that they were under the evil king Togbe Agorkoli (Agorkoli), and so that they could escape his harsh rule, they would make a hole in the wall that surrounded their city.

text: Nɔ ŋudzɔ ɖe ame si nèɖe asi le viwòa ŋu la ŋu!
ref: Be careful with the person you leave your child with!
translated: Be careful with the person you entrusted your child to!

text: Te ɖe amesiwo doa dzidzɔ na wò ŋu, eye nàyi teƒe siwo ana nàkpɔ dzidzɔ.
ref: Approach those who make you happy, and go to places that make you feel happy.
translated: Be close to those who bring you joy, and go to places that will make you happy.

text: Womete ŋu wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ʋuɖoɖoa ŋu le ga sue si le wo si ta.
ref: They failed to organize the transport because of the limited funds.
translated: They could not make arrangements for the trip due to the little money they had.

text: Ele be amewo nakpɔ gome le asitsatsa me eye woana woaƒe gbe nanyo ɖedzi.
ref: People should engage in business and improve their standards of living.
translated: People should participate in business and make their voice heard.

text: Le afisia hã la, nu etɔ̃liae nye koklolã si woɖa.
ref: Again, the third ingredient is cooked chicken.
translated: Here too, the third item was the cooked chicken.

text: Ne èlia ati nyui aɖe si me atikutsetsewo le lae míenaa tutu wò be nàŋe, elabena wonya be ne edo nyuie la, yewoƒe gome anɔ yewo si.
ref: it is when you climb a good tree with fruits that we give you a push so pluck, because they know when it comes out good, they will have their share.
translated: When you climb a good tree that has fruits, that is why we give you a ladder to reach them, because they know that if it thrives, they will have their share.

text: Hekpe ɖe gadzraɖoƒewo ŋu la, afi kae nutoa me akpa gãtɔ zãa ga le?
ref: Besides banks, where do most locals borrow money from?
translated: Besides banks, where does most of the community spend money?

text: 1. Ŋutinyagbɔgblɔ: Esia nye fefe ƒomevi aɖe si ame tsitsiwo kple ɖeviwo siaa ate ŋu awɔ. Fefe sia ƒomevi nyea fiẽsi me esime dzinu bliboa dzena zi geɖe
ref: 1. Storytelling: This is a type of game that can be play by both old and young. This type of game is mostly play in the evening when the full moon is visible
translated: 1. Storytelling: This is a type of game that both adults and children can play. This type of game is usually played in the evening when the full moon often appears.

text: Wobia tso asitsalawo si be woalé lãmesẽnyawo ƒe mɔfiamewo me ɖe asi hafi ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe dɔlélea nu.
ref: Market vendors were asked to follow the health guiderines to survive the pandemic.
translated: They asked the traders to adhere to health guidelines before they could withstand the disease.

text: Hafi amewo nakpɔ nunya le dɔwɔwɔ kple mɔ̃wo me la, kadodomɔnu kple alesi wonɔa agbee nɔ Akantɔwo si.
ref: Before people got wisdom in working with machines, the Akans had ways of communication and how they led their life.
translated: For people to gain wisdom in working with machines and technology, communication and their way of life were with the Akans.

text: Togbɔ be dɔléle sia mebɔ ɖe ame geɖe me o hã la, afɔku le eme na amesiwo ŋu dɔléle sia le ŋutɔ.
ref: Although this disease is rare in many people, it is very dangerous for those who have this disease.
translated: Although this disease is not common among many people, it is very dangerous for those who have it.

text: Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si li fifia nye tiatiawɔha ƒe zimenɔla tsã.
ref: The current vice president previously served as chairman of the electoral commission.
translated: The President's current aide is the former chairman of the election commission.

text: Wode se nɛ tso afima be wòaɖo dze kple Chelse ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe dɔdzikpɔlawo le telefon dzi.
ref: They instructed him from there to have a chat with the Chelse team managementon phone.
translated: He was instructed from there to speak with Chelsea Football Club officials on the phone.

text: Ele be woabu dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe dzeɖoɖowo ŋu vevie, elabena zi geɖe la, nyatakaka veviwo, mɔfiamewo alo mɔfiame vevi siwo dzi dziɖuɖua le la gblɔm.
ref: Official communication should be taken seriously, as it often conveys important information, instructions, or policies from authoritative sources.
translated: It is important to carefully consider the statements of government officials, because they often convey important information, directives, or crucial policies that the government is pursuing.

text: Ɣeyiɣi didi: Dɔmeɖui si nɔa anyi ɣleti ade alo esi wu nenema.
ref: Long-term: Constipation that lasts for six months or more.
translated: Chronic: A peptic ulcer that lasts six months or longer.

text: Ele be woadze agbagba akpɔ kuxi tɔxɛ siwo nyɔnuviwo doa goe le sukudede le dukɔa me gbɔ.
ref: Efforts need to be made to address the specific challenges faced by girls in accessing education in the country.
translated: They should strive to address the specific challenges that girls face in education in the country.

text: Le nyateƒe me la, dɔléle siawo ate ŋu agblẽ nu le míaƒe ŋutilã hã ŋu.
ref: The reality is that these illnesses can actually harm our bodies as well.
translated: In fact, these diseases can also harm our body.

text: Alhaji Abubakari Alhassan ɖe kuku na dziɖuɖua be ne sẽ eƒe sewo me le eƒe mɔzɔzɔ kple galamsey me ale be woateŋu alé kokoo kple eƒe nyawo me ɖe asi.
ref: Alhaji Abubakari Alhassan has made a plea to the government that he should tightened his rules in his journey against galamsey so that they can maintained the cocoa and its issues.
translated: Alhaji Abubakari Alhassan pleaded with the government to strengthen its laws in its fight against galamsey so that it can effectively control cocoa and its related issues.

text: Wogale wo dometɔ aɖewo zãm, gake womegale wo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ zãm o.
ref: Some are still in use, but the majority are no longer in use.
translated: Some of them are still being used, but most of them are no longer being used.

text: Nufialaa dze dzeɖoɖo aɖe gɔme kple eƒe sukuviawo.
ref: The teacher started a general conversation with her students.
translated: The teacher began a discussion with his/her students.

text: Nyɔnuviawo nɔa wo dada, si nye agbledela dovevienu ŋutɔ la gbɔ.
ref: The girls live with their mother, who is a very hardworking farmer.
translated: The daughters live with their mother, who is a very hardworking farmer.

text: Le ƒe alafa 16 lia ƒe nuwuwu la, Ghana-dukɔ akpa gãtɔ nɔ teƒe siwo yi egbea.
ref: By the end of 16th century, most of the ethnic groups constituting the modern Ghanaian population had settled in their present locations.
translated: By the end of the 16th century, most of the Ghanaian nation was located in the areas of present-day Ghana.

ref: Rukaya and Asana's workspace was always neat and organized. They always made sure to put everything in its proper place.
translated: Rukia and Asana's workplace was well-maintained, and they always made arrangements for the work.

ref: Mobile money agents are receiving less commission because of mobile money tax.
translated: Workers who are looking at their mobile phones do not help them make money.

ref: Investigations even showed that, some people were severely injured, when they were straggling to get inside.
translated: Research also showed that some people sustained serious injuries while they were trying to get into it.

text: Ame siwo le Portland, si nye Oregon, si nye "Portal Homowo kple Venyɔnuviwo Ƒe Ŋkekenyui " (Portalland Homowo Ƒe Agbalẽ Gã) la wɔe be yewoaɖu ŋkekenyui le yewoƒe aƒemetɔwo gbɔ.
ref: Ga people living in Portland, Oregon host the "Portland Homowo & Twins Festival" to celebrate alongside their native counterparts.
translated: The people in Portland, Oregon, who are involved in "Portal Homowo and Maidens' Festival" (Portalland Homowo Grand Book), decided to celebrate the festival with their family members.

text: Le afisia hã la, wotsɔ woƒe kotokuwo eye wodzra woƒe tu siwo me tɔsisi Twi tsrɔ̃e ɖo la ɖo.
ref: Again, they took their sacks and kept their guns in which made river twi destroyed it.
translated: Here too, they took their bags and stored their guns which the Twi River had damaged.

ref: What should be done by local government to develop their local areas?
translated: What is the local government doing with the aim of bringing development to your regions?

ref: There is a big percentage of older people among the refugees.
translated: The number of elderly people is high among the refugees.

ref: There is a rising number of coronavirus cases in Ghana prisons and inmates health is becoming a public concern
translated: Coronavirus is spreading in Ghana's prisons, and the health of prisoners has become a matter of concern.

ref: The dam project makes use of the numerous rivers in the area.
translated: The dam's project utilizes many rivers in the area.

text: Ne míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu nyuie la, ɣeyiɣi aɖe va yi la, Bonotɔwo ƒe nutoae nye esi woyɔna be Akantɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ.
ref: If we look at it well, some time ago, the Bono community was the one called the Akan community.
translated: If we look closely at it, some time ago, the Bono region was what was known as the Akan confederation.

ref: A woman was convicted for illegal possession of meat.

ref: In view of this, they realized that the arrangements could be implemented.
translated: Therefore, they saw that they would be able to carry out the arrangements.

ref: Mast sites are managed by the terecommunication companies.
translated: Organizations in discussion use databases in Mast

text: Wogblɔ be yewomada asi ɖe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ aɖeke dzi o, woxlɔ̃ nu be aƒo ame alo ame ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ɖesiaɖe si woakpɔ be ele nuwɔna mawo tɔgbe wɔm la nu ƒu eye woatsɔ wo ade asi na sedzikpɔlawo.

ref: Any power struggle can cause displacement of innocent Ghanaians.
translated: Every power struggle can make innocent Ghanaians suffer.

text: Egblɔ be, ɖoɖo sia nye dziɖuɖumegãwo kple dukplɔla ƒe aɖaŋuɖoha ƒe mɔfiame si wole mɔ kpɔm be adze egɔme le February me
ref: He said that is, this process is the direction of the chief ministers and the presidential advisory board which is expected to start in February
translated: It stated that this plan is a directive from the government officials and the president's advisory council, which is expected to start in February.

ref: The efforts to eradicate malaria are underway headed by the Minister of Health
translated: Efforts to eliminate malaria are ongoing under the leadership of the Ministry of Health.

text: Wozãa numiemie siawo elabena exɔa ɣeyiɣi didi hafi buna keŋkeŋ le anyigba aɖe dzi, ne wobuna kura gɔ̃ hã.
ref: They use these plants because they take a long time to completely disappear from a piece of land, if they do at all.
translated: They use these materials because it takes a long time for them to completely decompose on the ground, if they decompose at all.

text: Le eƒe lɛta si wotso afia nɛ me la, ŋutsu sia ƒe afɔɖeɖea tsi tre ɖe Ekiti Ðeviwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe se si wowɔ le ƒe 2012 ƒe Se 32 ƒe akpa 2 lia me ŋu.
ref: In his sentenced letter, the action of this man is against the Ekiti Children's Foundation law which was made in 2012 Act 32 section 2.

text: Ame aɖewo tiae be yewoaʋu ayi teƒe bubuwo le susu siwo tae.
ref: Some individuals choose not to migrate to other areas due to personal reasons.
translated: Some people chose to move to other places for their own reasons.

ref: The malaria parasite can be spread to humans through bites of infected mosquitoes.
translated: This pathogen can spread among humans through infected secretions during eating.

text: Vevesese sia ate ŋu axɔ miniti alo gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo hafi wòaɖe eye woate ŋu azã atike aɖewo atsɔ aɖe vevesese sia dzi akpɔtɔ hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe.
ref: This pain may take a few minutes or hours to resolve and some medications can be used to relieve this pain for a while.
translated: This pain can take a few minutes or a few hours to subside, and some medication can be used to relieve this pain for a period.

text: Ajumako dukɔmeviwo ƒoe ɖe enu be woawɔ dɔ aduadu kple nutoa me dziɖuɖua be woatsɔ atsi aɖitsi ƒe kaka nu.
ref: The people of Ajumako have urged to work together with the local government in order to combat the spread of measles.
translated: The citizens of Ajumako urged for collaboration with the local government to curb the spread of cholera.

text: Ehiã be sukudodokpɔkpɔwo nanɔ dzadzraɖoɖi bliboe be woate ŋu asrɔ̃ nu tso sukudɔwɔƒewo ŋu.
ref: School labs need to be fully equipped to handle Chemistry lessons.
translated: It is necessary that school examinations are completely ready so that one can learn about schools.

text: Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe hamemetsiwo nye dukɔa ƒe nuto vovovowo.
ref: Members of parliament represent different regions of the country.
translated: The constituencies of the government officials are the various regions of the country.

text: Nya siawo tsɔa agbemenusɔsrɔ̃ kple nunya veviwo ɖe asi. Ne èhe to na wò gɔme la, èƒoa fu ɖe wò dɔgbo me. Nenema ke nunɔla la nɔa anyi ɖe adzɔge be yeƒe du namu, anye eƒe akpa aɖe.
ref: These sayings carry important life lessons and wisdom. If you punish your bottom, you flatulate in your stomach. Similarly, the priest sits aloof for his town to collapse, he will be part of it.
translated: These words carry life lessons and important wisdom. If you give in to your desires, you cause trouble in your work. Similarly, the priest stays at a distance so that the difficulties of his town become his responsibility.

text: Ke boŋ ɣeaɖewoɣi la, dɔlélea te ŋu ɖea eɖokui fiana vie alo ɖea dzesiwo fiana be eya hã li.
ref: Instead, sometimes the disease can manifest itself slightly or show symptoms to indicate that it is also present.
translated: However, sometimes the illness can manifest itself slightly or show signs that it is also present.

text: Nuɖaɖavi bubuwo akpe ɖe ŋuwò be woakpɔ nutoa me ta.
ref: Alternative cooking sources help to preserve the environment.
translated: Other elements will help you to take care of the community.

text: Wode kpovitɔ aɖe gaxɔ me le esi wòzã adzɔxelawo ƒe ga le mɔ gbegblẽ nu le ɣleti si va yi me. ta.
ref: A certain officer was imprisoned for misusing taxpayers money last month.
translated: A police officer was imprisoned because he used taxpayers' money improperly last month.

text: Fifia, ne ame akpa gãtɔ kpɔ dzesi dzĩ sia la, wokpɔa lɔlɔ̃, ŋusẽ kple ɖekawɔwɔ.

translated: Currently, when most people see this red symbol, they perceive love, strength, and unity.

ref: Some raised issues are company obligations but all he's asking for is calmness.
translated: Some of these are the responsibilities of the employees, but if it is simply requested, it is satisfactory.

text: Menye teƒe ɖe sia ɖe si le dukɔa me lae sɔ be woatu xɔa o.
ref: Not every place in the country is suitable for construction of the borehole.
translated: Not every place in the country is suitable for building the house.

ref: Some parents didn't take their children for immunization upon rumours of fake drugs.
translated: Some parents do not believe their children avoid lies and harmful drugs.

text: Woɖo aɖaŋu na ɖeviwo be woasrɔ̃ nu tso sukudede ŋu.
ref: Children are advised to be positive about education.
translated: They advised the children to learn about schooling.

text: Tɔdziʋua dze anyi le ta la me eye ame geɖe ku.
ref: The ferry capsized in the lake and killed a number of people.
translated: The ship sank in the incident and many people died.

text: Tsi dzadzɛa akpe ɖe mía ŋu míawɔ avu kple dɔléle siwo tsoa tsi me.
ref: The clean water will help in the fight against waterborne diseases.
translated: Clean water helps us fight waterborne diseases.

text: Ne amesiwo le liƒoa dzi dometɔ ɖeka ɖee ɖa gɔ̃ hã la, egatsina ake.
ref: Even when one of those sharing the boundary uproots it, it grows again.
translated: Even if one of those on the shore removes it, it will grow again.

text: Wotsɔa gbemelã saa vɔe eye esia fia Aboakyertɔwo ƒe azãɖuɖu ƒe gɔmedzedze.
ref: The bushbuck is sacrificed and this signifies the start of the Aboakyer festival.
translated: A wild animal is sacrificed, and this marks the beginning of the Aboakyer festival.

text: Le nyadzɔdzɔwo me la, nudzɔdzɔ wɔnublanui sia dzɔ le Fianyɔnua ƒe aƒeme. Fianyɔnua ƒe ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔe nye Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.
ref: In the news, this sad incidence occurred at the Queen's house. The Queen''s actual name is Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.
translated: According to reports, this unfortunate event happened at the Queen's residence. The Queen's real name is Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.

text: Dukplɔla wɔ takpekpe eye wodzro dedienɔnɔnyawo me le Ghana ƒe dɛwo dzi.
ref: The president held a meeting to discuss security lapses on the Ghanaian borders.
translated: The President held a meeting and security matters in Ghana's waters were discussed.

text: Abe alesi aƒetɔ tsitsia gblɔ nya sia kple gbe bɔbɔe ene la: geɖe wu na eɖokui wu eƒe zɔhɛ: eye esi wòzi ɖoɖoe ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le ema megbe la: Oliver bɔbɔ nɔ anyi kpoo.
ref: As the old gentleman said this in a low voice: more to himself than to his companion: and as he remained silent for a short time afterwards: Oliver sat quite still.
translated: As the old gentleman said this in a gentle voice: 'much more for himself than his companion'; and when he paused for a short time after that, Oliver sat down silently.

text: Nu si wowɔna na vidadaa kple vidzĩa enye be, wonaa gbetike wo be woano ale be vidadaa kple ɖevia nakpɔ lãmesẽ nyui.
ref: What they do for the mother and the baby is that,they give them herbal medicine to drink so that the mother and child will have good health.
translated: What is done for the mother and the newborn is to give them herbal medicine to drink so that the mother and the child will have good health.

text: Ametsitsiwo, dɔnɔwo, kple ame akpe aɖewo abe ŋkuagbãtɔ Akua Mansa kple Akosua Serwaa si xɔ ƒe 90 ene gblɔ be vovo mele yewo ŋu kura ne wole atike dim o
ref: The elderly, the sick, and some thousands like 90-year-old blind Akua Mansa and Akosua Serwaa say they are very busy when it comes to seeking treatment.
translated: Elderly people, the sick, and thousands of others, including blind Akua Mansa and Akosua Serwaa, who is 90 years old, said they have no time at all when seeking medicine.

text: Ne edze ƒoƒo ɖe edzi la, ate ŋu atso amea ƒe nuɖuɖu kple ami ƒe ƒuƒoƒo gbɔ.
ref: When it starts to build up, it may be caused by the person's diet and fat accumulation.
translated: If it starts to swell, it can be due to the person's diet and fat accumulation.

text: Le ƒe 1964 me la, Nkrumah yi Dukɔwo Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ðoɖo Ƒe Adre Na Dukɔwo Ƒe Xɔtudɔ Kple Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ me, eye wògblɔ be suku vevitɔ si wɔa dɔ le ŋgɔ tsɔ wɔwɔm la gbɔ eye wòbia be woakeke suku bubuwo ɖe edzi.
ref: In 1964, Nkrumah brought forth the Seven Year Development Plan for National Reconstruction and Development, which identified education as a key source of development and called for the expansion of secondary technical schools.
translated: In 1964, Nkrumah addressed the Seven-Year Development Plan for National Construction and Development, and he stated that the main school leading the effort was insufficient and requested that other schools be expanded.

text: Tsãtɔa nyea agbanɔamedzinɔla nenema ke le afisiafi si wotsɔe da ɖe sinimaɖeɖe me - (eɖanye nugbugbɔgbugbɔ, gbɔdɔdɔ, awu ɖeɖe le eƒe awudzraɖoƒe alo nu bubu aɖe si le abe ema ene o.) Ema hã eye wòna wonyae nyuie le sinimawɔƒewo.
ref: The former used to be equally obliging wherever she was placed in filming - (whether kissing, having sex, undressing in her wardrobe or something else like that.) That too and made him well known in the film industry.
translated: The former is held accountable just as it is wherever it is put on display in a film showing - (whether it is a re-enactment, sex, undressing in his wardrobe, or anything else like that.) This also made it well-known in film circles.

text: Nyateƒee, ga nye nusi ame sia ame hiã le eƒe agbe me be wòate ŋu aɖɔ nuwo ɖo.
ref: Of course, money is something that everyone needs in their life in order to make things right.
translated: Indeed, money is what everyone needs in their life to be able to fix things.

text: Ame aɖewo hã yɔnɛ be Tanogbe.
ref: Some also call it the Tano language.
translated: Some people also call it Tanogbe.

text: Agbledela geɖewo adze le wo ɖokuiwo si to ɖeɖefia sia dzi.
ref: More agriculturalists will get exposure through this exhibition.
translated: Many farmers will fail themselves through this demonstration.

text: Nuƒoƒo tẽ ƒe habɔbɔ siwo le sukuwo fia nu sukuviwo tso ƒewuiwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia ŋu.
ref: Straight talk clubs in schools have educated students about the adolescent stage.
translated: Public speaking clubs in schools teach students about adolescence.

text: Azɔ hã, ne xewo va le nu gblẽm le agblea ŋu to nukuwo ɖeɖe me la, vɔvɔ̃donu aɖe dada ɖe afima ado vɔvɔ̃ na wo.
ref: Also, when birds take to disturbing the farm by uprooting the crops, putting a scarecrow there will scare them away.
translated: Furthermore, if birds come to damage the farm by picking the grains, placing a scarecrow there will frighten them.

text: Zi geɖe la, amedzro siwo va srãa wo kpɔ la kpɔa dzidzɔ ne woyi teƒe yeyewo hena fefe siwo wowɔna le duta. Ele be bɔlƒoha la natu amedzrodzeƒe siwo ame siwo doa vivi ɖe bɔlƒoƒo ŋu anɔ.
ref: Visiting fans usually have fun when they go to new places for away games. The football club should build hotels where the fans can stay.
translated: Often, visitors who come to visit them enjoy going to new places for games played abroad. The football club should build guest houses for people who love football.

text: Amesiwo dze egɔme hã doa alɔ ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɖoɖo siwo wowɔna le woƒe nutoawo me la ƒã.
ref: The initiators also barely support the development programs in their communities.
translated: Those who initiate also often support the development plans implemented in their communities.

text: Akɔntabubu le vevie ŋutɔ le dɔwɔƒe.
ref: Accountability is so important in a work place.
translated: Accounting is very important in the workplace.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒã hã be woaxe fetu si nye GHC2,000.00 na amesiame si ateŋu akpeɖe wo ŋu be woanya susu si tututu ta wòwɔe nenema, si na wolée.
ref: Police have also announced a reward of GHC2,000.00 for anyone who can help them find out the exact reason why he did that, that has caused his arrest.
translated: The police also announced that they would pay a reward of GHC2,000.00 to anyone who can help them understand the exact reason for his actions, which led to his arrest.

text: Aʋawɔwɔ le anyigba ta gakpɔtɔ le amewo dome le kɔƒenutowo me.
ref: There are still land conflicts among people in the rural areas.
translated: Fighting over land still continues among people in rural areas.

text: Dziɖuɖua mena ga be woatu mɔ aɖewo le nuto aɖewo me o.
ref: The government does not allocate funds to construct some roads in some areas.
translated: The government did not provide money to build some roads in some regions.

text: Ele be nutome la naxɔ senyalawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe be wòafia mɔ wo le senyawo me.
ref: The district should recruit a legal team to guide them in legal processes.
translated: The region needs to get a group of lawyers to guide them in legal matters.

text: Le ŋkeke ʋee siwo va yi me la, elektrikŋusẽ do go kuxi siwo wɔe be amesiwo di be yewoaƒle akaɖiwo mete ŋu kpɔ ɖeka o.
ref: In the past few days electricity has been facing problems that have prevented those who want to buy lights from getting one.
translated: In the past few days, the electricity supply experienced problems, which resulted in those who wanted to buy electricity being unable to obtain any.

text: Enye fefe dodzidzɔname aɖe. Ha siwo wodzina le fefea me la dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Pempenaa, Nanaa!Kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ dada koo...". Woƒonɛ zi geɖe le ŋdɔ me.
ref: It is an interesting game. Some of the songs sing during the game is in session is "Pempenaa, Nanaa!See, see, see, see dada koo...". It is mostly played in the afternoon
translated: It is an enjoyable game. Some of the songs sung in the game are "Pempenaa, Nanaa! Look, look, look, look, just grandma...". It is often played in the afternoon.

text: Kplɔla siwo tso Nadowli-Kaleo Nutome, Bulisa, Jirapa Dudzikpɔha, kple Talensi Nutome ƒo ƒu lɔ̃ be yewoawɔ dɔ abe ƒuƒoƒo ene.
ref: The leaders from Nadowli-Kaleo District, Bulisa, Jirapa Municipal Assembly, and Talensi District together agreed to work as a team.
translated: Leaders from Nadowli-Kaleo District, Builsa, Jirapa Traditional Area, and Talensi District gathered and agreed to work as a team.

text: Coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a gblẽ nu le dukɔ bliboa ŋu vevie eye dukɔ bliboa awɔ aʋa kple coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a le míaƒe dua me.
ref: The whole country is highly affected by the coronavirus pandemic and there will be a national fight against the coronavirus pandemic in our town.
translated: The coronavirus pandemic has severely affected the entire nation, and the entire nation will fight against the coronavirus pandemic in our country.

text: Ŋutsuawo nedzi hadzidzi, Eye nyɔnuwo nenɔ ɣe ɖum.
ref: Let the men do the singing, and the women do the dancing.
translated: Let the men sing, and let the women dance.

text: Anyigba ŋuti nyaʋiʋliawo na amewo bu amewo ƒe agbe kple nunɔamesiwo le Agona Swedru
ref: The land disputes resulted in loss of lives and properties in Agona Swedru
translated: The land disputes caused people to lose their lives and properties in Agona Swedru.

text: Nkyinkyim nye nyakpakpa aɖe si le Fantetɔwo ƒe ŋutinyawo me si le abe nuwɔwɔ si ƒe nɔnɔme le abe zigzag ene. Woxɔe se be ekpɔa teƒe kɔkɔewo ta eye be ekpɔa ame ta le gbɔgbɔ me.
ref: Nkyinkyim is a mythical creature in Fante folklore that takes the form of a twisted, zigzag-shaped creature. It is believed to guard sacred places and is associated with spiritual protection.
translated: Nkyinkyim is a mythical creature in the stories of the Fante people, which has a zigzag-like form. It is believed that it protects sacred places and that it protects people spiritually.

text: Vevienyenye aɖewoe nye, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míenya alesi xexeame le zɔzɔm, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míeɖoa dze kple dukɔ vovovowo, enaa míekpɔa dzidzɔ kple bubuawo.
ref: some of the importance are, it helps us to know how the world is moving, it helps us to communicate with different peoples, makes us happy and so on.
translated: Some of its importance is that it helps us understand how the world works, enables us to communicate with different nations, and brings us joy and other benefits.

text: Dziɖuɖudɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ le kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ tsɔ dzro fetu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖoa me be yewole te sesĩe.
ref: The Association of Government Workers stated at a meeting held to discuss the salary increment proposal that they firmly stand their ground.
translated: The Government Workers' Association stated at a meeting held to discuss the proposed salary reduction that they are strongly resisting.

text: Nutomea ƒe ŋgɔnɔla xɔ dzɔla yeye ɖe dɔ me le asi me.
ref: The district leader has employed a new watchman in the market.
translated: The community leader has recently employed a new watchman.

text: Ele be míana xɔseha siwo le nutoa me nakpɔ gome le sɔhɛwo ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti nufiafia me.
ref: We should involve the local faith communities to educate the youth about sex education.
translated: We must allow religious organizations in the community to participate in youth sexuality education.

text: Azɔ hã, ele tsi ɖevia, dzraa eŋu ɖo eye wònɔa fofoa ƒe ƒometɔwo lalam.
ref: Also, she baths the child, dressed and wait for the family of the father.
translated: Furthermore, he/she nurtures the child, prepares himself/herself, and waits for his/her father's relatives.

text: Woadzro dɔléle sia ƒe afɔkuwo me eye woakpɔ egbɔe.
ref: The dangers of this disease will be assessed and remedies will be provided.
translated: They will discuss the dangers of this disease and address it.

text: Nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ dometɔ ɖekae nye ale si amewo wɔa nu vlo wɔwɔ le míaƒe hatsotsowo me tɔwo nye be womehea nu gbegblẽ vɛ o.
ref: One of the causes of crime in our communities is poor upbringing.
translated: One of the wrongdoings is how people commit evil acts in our societies, and the nature of this is that they do not suffer bad consequences.

text: Kɔnu sia bia be woatsɔ anyi dzĩ (Akpade) atre ʋɔtru eve siwo le eƒe axawo dzi le Fiɖa si nye Twins Yam Ŋkekenyui dzi.
ref: This rite involves plastering two side doors with red clay (Akpade) on the Friday of the Twins Yam Festival.
translated: This custom requires that two doors on its sides be smeared with red earth (Akpade) on the Friday of the Twins Yam Festival.

text: Nublanuinya aɖe dzɔ ɖe nyɔnu aɖe si xɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃ (15) dzi le Konongo le Ashanti nutoa me.
ref: A sad thing has happened to a lady of the age fifteen (15) in Konongo in the Ashanti region.
translated: A tragedy occurred to a 15-year-old woman in Konongo in the Ashanti Region.

text: Ele be woanɔ dɔnɔ siwo le nɔnɔme sesẽ aɖe me la ƒe nɔnɔme nyuitɔ me nanɔ nɔvi siwo le kɔdzi.
ref: Patients in a critical state should be given priority in the hospital.
translated: It is necessary that patients in difficult conditions are in their best possible state, and that relatives in the hospital are also well.

text: Katoliko-ha la ana asigɛ nunɔlawo le Ebola dɔvɔ̃a dome.
ref: The catholic church will provide gloves to the priests amidst the Ebola outbreak.
translated: The Catholic Church will provide support to priests amidst the Ebola epidemic.

text: Ne ƒomea me tɔ bubu yi anyigbaa dzi la, esia ana woanya be ame aɖe va afima xoxo.
ref: When another family member goes to the land, this will communicate to them that someone has already been there.
translated: If another family member goes to the land, this will let them know that someone has already been there.

text: Ghanatɔ asitsala si xɔ ƒe 43 si le UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, na wonya eƒe tameɖoɖo le NDC ƒe aflaga ƒe hoʋiʋli ŋu.
ref: Ghanaian business man aged 43 who lives in UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, has made his intentions about contesting for the NDC flagbeareship known.
translated: Ghanaian businessman Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, 43, based in the UK, has announced his intention regarding the NDC flagbearership contest.

text: Wona tsyɔ̃evi alafa ɖeka blaatɔ̃ susɔeawo le nutoa me, eye woawo hã xɔ sukudɔwɔnuwo kple sukunudidiwo.
ref: One hundred fifty orphans have been given scholarships in the district and they also received scholastic materials and school requirements.
translated: There are one hundred and fifty remaining orphans in the district, and they also received school supplies and school uniforms.

text: Woaɖo ŋku ame siwo le ŋutinya me la dzi le woƒe  akpa si wowɔ na dukɔa ta.
ref: The historicals will be remembered for their contributions towards the country.
translated: Historical figures will be remembered for the part they played for the nation.

text: Ðewohĩ ƒe sia ƒe azãɖuɣi madzɔ dzi na ame abe alesi wònɔna ɖaa ene o elabena wode se ɖe dutoƒo kpekpewo nu
ref: This year's festive season may not be as exciting as usual since public gatherings have been banned
translated: Perhaps this year's celebration will not be as enjoyable as it usually is because public gatherings have been banned.

text: De ŋugble le nu nyui siwo dzɔ le wò agbe me ŋu, eye nàkpɔ dzidzɔ.
ref: Think a lot about the good things that have happened in your life, and be happy.
translated: Reflect on the good things that have happened in your life, and find joy.

text: Ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo kple hadomeŋgɔyiyi ƒe dziɖuɖumegã tsãtɔ bu si na be hadomeɖoɖoa do kpo nu.
ref: The former minister of gender and social development disappeared which made the partnership fail.
translated: Men and women and the former social progress official failed, which led to the collapse of the social system.

text: Ame sia ame, ame tsitsi alo ɖevi ate ŋu aɖu abɔbɔwo.
ref: Snails can be eaten by anyone, adult or child.
translated: Anyone, adult or child, can eat snails.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒãe le radiodɔwɔƒewo be amewo nade dzesi ame kukua, esi wole numekuku wɔm be yewoakpɔ nyi siwo wofi siwo dziɖuɖua na la.
ref: The police announced on radio stations for people to identify the body, as they carry out investigations to recover the stolen cattle provided by the government.
translated: The police announced on radio stations for people to identify the deceased, as they are investigating to find the stolen cattle that the government had provided.

text: Wo dometɔ ɖeka ate ŋu awɔ nu vevii eye wòakpɔtɔ anye ame bubuwo tɔ.
ref: One can be disabled and still live a normal life like others.
translated: One of them can do something significant and still belong to others.

text: Wodzroa dɔwɔla nyui aɖe le ale si wòtea ŋu wɔa dɔe ta.
ref: A good worker is evaluated on the basis of his or her performance.
translated: They admire a good worker for their ability to work.

text: Twigbe gbãtɔ si woŋlɔe nye Akuapem Twi, eye eyae nye gbe gbãtɔ si me woŋlɔ Ŋɔŋlɔ Kɔkɔeawo le Twi me.
ref: The first written language of Twi was Akuapem Twi, and it was the first language in which the Holy Scriptures were written in Twi.
translated: The first written Twi dialect is Akuapem Twi, and it is the first dialect in which the Holy Scriptures were written.

text: Ame etɔ̃ bu woƒe luʋɔ le afɔku gã aɖe si dzɔ le Sunyani Techiman mɔ dzi me.
ref: Three people have lost their souls in a fatal accident which occurred at the Sunyani Techiman road.
translated: Three people lost their lives in a major accident that occurred on the Sunyani-Techiman road.

text: Ele be nutome gã dziɖuɖumegãwo naɖe asi le woƒe masɔmasɔwo ŋu eye woawɔ dɔ le mɔawo dzi.
ref: The district officials should put their differences aside and work on the roads.
translated: It is necessary that the major regional government officials resolve their differences and work on the roads.

text: Nye nyinɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ dzea dɔ, Woléa ŋku ɖe woƒe lãmesẽ kple woƒe lãmesẽ ŋu.
ref: Most of my cows are diseased, posing a challenge for their proper care and well-being.
translated: Most of my cows get sick, they pay attention to their health and well-being.

text: Fififi ƒe seselelãme nɔa esi ale gbegbe be eɖua nu ɖe ​​eme be yeawu fififi la ŋutɔ nu.
ref: He gets a feeling of theft so great that he eats into it to complete the theft itself.
translated: The feeling of Fififi is so intense within it that it consumes it from within to kill the Fififi itself.

text: Tsã la, dziɖuɖua ɖo aʋawɔnu gbogbo aɖewo be woaɖe Polio ɖa le Ghana.
ref: Previously the government organized mass immunization to eliminate Polio from Ghana.
translated: In the past, the government deployed many resources to eradicate Polio in Ghana.

text: Viɖe kawoe do tso dekɔnu sia me?
ref: What were the benefits of this culture?
translated: What benefits come from this culture?
